command: Set-Location 'C:\TaskManager'; $pyVer = & '.venv\Scripts\python.exe' --version 2>&1; Write-Output "Python Version: $pyVer"; $arch = & '.venv\Scripts\python.exe' -c "import struct; print(struct.calcsize('P')*8)" 2>&1; Write-Output "Architecture: ${arch}-bit"; Write-Output '--- Trying PySide6 install with --pre ---'; & '.venv\Scripts\pip.exe' install PySide6 --pre 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 5; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { Write-Output '--- PySide6 --pre failed, trying PyQt6 ---'; & '.venv\Scripts\pip.exe' install PyQt6 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 5 }; Write-Output '--- Installed packages ---'; & '.venv\Scripts\pip.exe' list 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern 'PySide6|PyQt6|SQLAlchemy|pydantic|pyinstaller'
description: تشخيص Python + محاولة تثبيت PySide6 --pre أو PyQt6 كبديل
